mapper.select: select rule_id, rule_name, trigger_type, growth_value, daily_limit, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from growth_rules where rule_id = #{ruleId} and deleted = false
select rule_id, rule_name, trigger_type, growth_value, daily_limit, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from growth_rules where deleted = false order by rule_id asc
mapper.update: update growth_rules set rule_name = #{ruleName}, trigger_type = #{triggerType}, growth_value = #{growthValue}, daily_limit = #{dailyLimit}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where rule_id = #{ruleId} and deleted = false
